title: rubus villicaulis f. rotundifolius
intro: Rubus villicaulis f. rotundifolius, also known as the Japanese black raspberry, is a variety of the Asian black raspberry plant, characterized by its rounded leaf shape. The plant's medicinal properties include its high content of anthocyanins and ellagic acid, which are known for their antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Rubus villicaulis f. rotundifolius include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against certain types of cancer. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and jams, which can be used to leverage its medicinal properties and health benefits.
